📦 Export & Deploy

Download an updated copy of this HTML file with ALL current certificates baked in. Upload this to Vercel so anyone scanning a QR code can see the certificates — even on a fresh device.

How it works: Certificates with images are stored inside the HTML file itself. When you generate or add a certificate, download this file and re-upload to Vercel to make it public.
